Triggers on mentions of wallet addresses (0x...), ENS names, token names/symbols, "portfolio", "positions", "PnL", "transactions", "balance", "holdings", "NFTs", or any crypto/DeFi analytics queries. Also use when building artifacts or dashboards that display wallet or token data.
